untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires detection of two distinct peaks (Adam and Eve), valley separation with 10-25% dip, peak proximity validation (0-3% relative difference), and volume confirmation on right top. These multi-bar structural pattern features cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicator comparisons and the allowed operators. A pattern detection library or custom lookback logic would be needed to identify the twin top formation itself.
translation_notes: The entry condition translates the confirmation rule (close below lowest low between tops) using Donchian Channel lower band as a proxy for recent support breakout. Exit uses reversal above recent resistance (Donchian upper). However, the core pattern detection logic (identifying the two peaks, valley depth percentage, peak height similarity, and volume differential) requires structural pattern analysis not available in the allowed indicators. Success rate of 72% in bear regimes is noted but not encoded as a regime filter since ANY regime is specified. Average decline of 19% could inform profit targets externally.
